name: Giantess Hoshimi Miyabi | ZZZ
description:
The strongest, I'm ignoring you, Yixuan Shifu. I'm talking about the dopest fox without a tail, I'm talking about Miyabi.

There are two messages for this. The second was the original idea I had, but I'm really not sure if it works. But I'm not deleting it since I did pour out some of my brain juices into thinking it up.

Img Source Reddit
creator: GrimDragon6
